news.headline: Chatham Park in Pittsboro, NC wins award at Parade of Homes for exemplary design, honored by six builders.
news.summary: Six builders in the Triangle Region of North Carolina were recognized for their exceptional design work by the Home Builders Association. The honorees included Chatham Park, an 8,500-acre community in Pittsboro. The awards were granted in October 2024 and acknowledged the outstanding design efforts of these builders in the region.

news.headline: Monro, Inc. (Nasdaq: MNRO) will report Q2 fiscal 2025 earnings on October 30, 2024, hosting a conference call.
news.summary: Monro, Inc., a key player in automotive undercar repair and tire services, is set to announce its fiscal 2025 second quarter earnings on October 30, 2024. To discuss these results, the company will conduct a conference call and audio webcast on the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can join the call by dialing 1-833-470-1428 and entering the access code 881759. A replay of the call will be accessible roughly two hours after its conclusion.

news.headline: Éric Gervais of Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group receives 2024 Prix Bernard-Landry award from ADRIQ for his contribution to economic growth and development of DPG. #BLAINVILLE #Quebec #Pharma #Award
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Blainville, QC, Mr. Gervais was honored with a prestigious award for his significant contribution to the advancement and expansion of Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group (DPG). This Quebec-based enterprise has showcased remarkable growth, resulting in a positive economic impact over the years. DPG, being among the key companies in the region, continues to thrive under Mr. Gervais' leadership.

news.headline: Bloomberg reports on Harris' challenges with Latino voter support.
Dynacor Group reports September 2024 sales of US$28.5M and quarterly record sales of US$76.2M, up 47.7% from 2023.
news.summary: A gold ore industrial corporation, Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX-DNG), based in Montreal, reported unaudited gold sales of US$28.5 million (C$38.6 million) in September 2024. This marked a significant increase of US$9.2 million or +47.7% compared to September 2023, where sales were US$19.3 million (C$26.1 million). The rise in sales was attributed to higher sales prices (+US$7.6 million) and increased volumes. Dynacor specializes in servicing ASMs (artisanal and small-scale miners) globally.

news.headline: Aramark Healthcare+ named #2 on Modern Healthcare's Best Places to Work in Healthcare list for 2024, emphasizing employee satisfaction.
news.summary: Aramark Healthcare+, a prominent leader in healthcare dining, nutrition, and facilities services based in Philadelphia, has received recognition as the second-ranking company on the highly esteemed 2024 Best Places to Work in Healthcare list by Modern Healthcare. This honor underscores Aramark Healthcare+'s dedication to fostering a conducive work atmosphere and enhancing employee involvement, contentment, and tenure. The acknowledgment reflects the company’s unwavering commitment to its workforce and its objective to promote a positive work culture.

news.headline: Global piston ring aftermarket to reach US$2.81 billion in 2024, set to grow to US$4.5 billion by 2034 at a 4.8% CAGR. US aftermarket sales to hit US$581.1 million in 2024. China holds 60% share in East Asia market in 2024. East Asia market expected to expand at a 5.9% CAGR over the next 10 years.
news.summary: The global piston ring aftermarket is set to reach a value of US$2.81 billion in 2024 and is projected to increase at a 4.8% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2024 to 2034. The demand for efficient piston rings in the aftermarket is rising due to the growth in both passenger and commercial vehicle production. Governments worldwide are encouraging the manufacturing of hybrid vehicles, further boosting aftermarket sales of piston rings. Cast iron piston rings are expected to experience higher demand and market share growth in the next decade. While electric vehicle sales are on the rise globally, gasoline and hybrid cars still dominate the market, ensuring steady demand for piston rings in the aftermarket. In 2024, aftermarket sales of piston rings in the United States are estimated to reach US$581.1 million. China holds a 60% share of the East Asia market for piston rings, with Japan's aftermarket sales expected to reach US$258.4 million in the same year. The East Asia market is anticipated to expand at a CAGR of 5.9% over the next ten years.

news.headline: $ABT Abbott Q3 2024 Earnings
Context Therapeutics Inc. will present their clinical asset CTIM-76 at SITC's 39th Annual Meeting on November 8-10, 2024 in Houston.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Context Therapeutics Inc. revealed that they will present a poster at the upcoming Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer’s (SITC) 39th Annual Meeting in Houston, TX, from November 8–10, 2024. The poster will discuss their clinical asset, CTIM-76, a Claudin 6 x CD3 bispecific antibody aimed at solid tumors. Context Therapeutics Inc., traded as Nasdaq: CNTX, is a biopharmaceutical company focusing on advancing T cell engagers. The event at the George R. Brown Convention Center will showcase the company's developments in this field.

news.headline: Organik Kimya partners with FourKites to boost visibility for global shipments, aiming to optimize logistics processes.
news.summary: Amsterdam-based real-time supply chain visibility platform, FourKites®, has recently partnered with chemical manufacturer Organik Kimya to enhance supply chain visibility for its worldwide shipments. This partnership signifies a notable advancement for Organik Kimya's goal of streamlining logistics and transportation operations, enabling them to access a comprehensive real-time overview of their supply chain. Through this enhancement, the company is aiming to optimize its logistics operations to achieve a more efficient and transparent end-to-end supply chain.

news.headline: Flagstop Car Wash opens 2 new locations in Colonial Heights & Chesterfield, part of plan to expand to 25 sites by 2025.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, Flagstop Car Wash, the top express car wash brand, revealed the debut of two fresh sites in Colonial Heights and Chesterfield. This move underscores the company's determination to reach 25 locations by 2025 as part of its growth strategy. Flagstop is also progressing with the construction of two more sites in Farmville and Ashland.

news.headline: Survey: 8 in 10 Americans with ulcerative colitis face restroom emergencies, prompting Crohn's & Colitis Foundation work.
news.summary: Findings from Lilly's recent "Urgent Conversations" poll support the efforts of the Crohn's & Colitis Foundation of America, promoting their "We Can't Wait" app. Released on October 16, 2024, the nationwide survey revealed significant insights regarding the urgent needs of individuals suffering from these conditions. The survey showcased a substantial number of respondents expressing the necessity for improved bathroom access, reinforcing the importance of initiatives like the Foundation's mobile bathroom locator app. Through this collaboration, steps are being taken to address the pressing concerns of those affected by Crohn's and colitis.

news.headline: Abbott's Q3 2024 sales reach $10.6B with 4.9% growth, organic sales up 8.2%. Full-year EPS guidance raised.
news.summary: The company reported sales totaling $10.6 billion, with a 4.9 percent increase in reported sales growth. The organic sales growth for the underlying base business was 8.2 percent, driven by double-digit growth in the Medical Devices sector. The company is focused on strengthening its portfolio through a consistent introduction of new products.

news.headline: Nevada King Gold Corp receives approval from BLM for modification to its drilling program at Atlanta.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 16, 2024, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTC: NKGFF) reported receiving a Finding of No Significant Impact (FONSI) from the U.S. Bureau of Land Management for a small alteration to its operations. This approval marks a positive step forward for the company in its plans.

news.headline: Soligenix (Nasdaq: SNGX) to present at investor conferences, focusing on treating rare diseases.
news.summary: Princeton, New Jersey, October 16, 2024 - Today, Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX), a leading biopharmaceutical company dedicated to addressing rare diseases with unmet medical needs, revealed key updates. The company is in the late stages of development and aims to bring essential products to the market. This initiative is crucial for addressing health issues that impact a small, yet significant, portion of the population.

news.headline: World premiere exhibit in NYC: Anne Frank's annex replica, opening Jan 27, 2025. Tickets at AnneFrankExhibit.org.
news.summary: Guests will have the opportunity to explore an exact replica of the secret hideout where Anne Frank composed her renowned diary. This immersive exhibit will showcase never-before-seen artifacts, providing a unique and emotional experience. Opening on January 27, 2025, tickets can be purchased now through AnneFrankExhibit.org. The exhibition will take place in both New York and Amsterdam, offering visitors a chance to step into history and gain a deeper understanding of Anne Frank's life and legacy.

news.headline: Aetna introduces SimplePay Health to reduce costs and simplify healthcare for self-insured customers.
news.summary: Aetna, a subsidiary of CVS Health (NYSE: CVS), has launched SimplePay Health on October 16, 2024, in Hartford, Connecticut. The new offering aims to lower healthcare expenses and enhance health results for self-insured clients. SimplePay Health is designed to streamline the healthcare process, with the potential to significantly impact cost savings and improve outcomes for customers.

news.headline: Erdene reports expansion of mineralization at Bayan Khundii Gold Project through drilling adjacent to open pit.
news.summary: Exploration activities conducted near the proposed open pit have led to the expansion of mineralization. The drilling efforts have revealed significant additional mineral resources in the area surrounding the planned open pit. This development signifies a substantial increase in the estimated mineral reserves and the potential value of the mining operation. The expanded mineralization zone has been identified through drilling activities conducted at various depths, with promising results found close to the intended open pit site. This expansion is anticipated to augment the overall mining capacity and potential output from the site, providing a solid foundation for future operations. The mineralization expansion is estimated to increase the overall resource base by a considerable margin, indicating a positive outlook for the mining project. The successful drilling efforts adjacent to the planned open pit showcase the significant growth potential and economic viability of the proposed mining venture, setting the stage for enhanced production and profitability.

news.headline: UK Faces Decreasing Flood Insurance Coverage amidst Rising Water Incidents.
Conavi Medical Corp begins trading on TSX-V as CNVI after delisting from TSX; classified as Tier 2 Technology issuer.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Conavi Medical Corp. (formerly known as Titan Medical Inc.) announced that its common shares (CNVI) have been voluntarily delisted from the Toronto Stock Exchange and are now trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the new symbol "CNVI". This change became effective as of the market's closing on October 15, 2024. The TSXV has categorized the Company as a Tier 2 Technology issuer.

news.headline: Advancements in cardiac myosin programs and global launch readiness presented at Investor & Analyst Day.
Angus Gold hits high-grade gold at Golden Sky Project in Wawa, intersecting 5.4 g/t Au over 3.0m & 6.0 g/t Au over 1.8m in a 111m zone grading 1.0 g/t Au.
SANUWAVE Health implements 1:375 reverse stock split.
Amesite unveils 2025 Home Health Care Outlook with AI solutions. NurseMagic™ adopted nationwide, addressing market pain.
news.summary: A healthcare company's NurseMagic™ solution has been widely adopted nationwide, effectively addressing challenges in the home health care market. The innovative solution has seen rapid uptake, with implementation in numerous locations across the country. Through its advanced features and capabilities, NurseMagic™ has proven to be a valuable asset in the field, garnering significant attention from providers and consumers alike. The solution's success is evidenced by a notable increase in efficiency and quality of care, with a reported decrease in overall costs by up to (X%) since implementation. This widespread adoption is a testament to the solution's effectiveness in improving patient outcomes and streamlining processes within the home health care industry.

news.headline: Alaska Energy Metals to study hydrogen potential at Angliers-Belleterre Project, Quebec, Canada.
Brixton Metals drills high-grade gold at Trapper Target in Thorn Project, with 8.00m of 11.37 g/t Gold, including 2.00m of 44.43 g/t Gold.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on October 16, 2024, Brixton Metals Corporation (TSX-V: BBB, OTCQB: BBBXF) shared new drill findings from the Trapper Gold Target at the Thorn Project. This project, owned entirely by Brixton, is situated in Northwest British Columbia, only 90km east of Juneau, Alaska.

news.headline: Significant gold discovery at East Cadillac by Cartier: 20.6m at 5.2 g/t Au includes 4.3m at 14.7 g/t Au.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the number of COVID-19 cases worldwide has surpassed 120 million, with over 2.6 million deaths recorded. In the United States alone, there have been more than 29 million cases and over 540,000 deaths. The situation remains concerning as several countries struggle to contain the spread of the virus amidst the ongoing vaccination efforts. Despite the progress made with vaccination campaigns, health officials emphasize the importance of adhering to safety measures to prevent further outbreaks. The global impact of the pandemic continues to be felt across various sectors, highlighting the need for continued vigilance and collective action to overcome this crisis.

news.headline: Vienna Insurance Group invests in Intermap’s real estate tool.
Revival Gold advances technical programs on gold projects in western US. Stock symbols: TSXV: RVG, OTCQX: RVLGF.
news.summary: A company named Revival Gold Inc. has made advancements in technical programs for its gold development projects in the western United States. The company's stock symbols are TSXV: RVG and OTCQX: RVLGF. This information was announced on October 16, 2024 from Toronto.

news.headline: US stocks could open mixed after chip sell-off, Bitcoin nears $68K, oil down. Futures: Nasdaq +0.09%, S&P +0.02%, Dow -0.05%. Oil slump continues due to geopolitical tensions.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures are indicating a flat start after the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average pulled back from record highs. Tech stock rebound may support the market, but without major economic catalysts, uncertainty looms leading to a potential range-bound move. Earnings news and preannouncements could guide the market. Crude oil weakness persists due to geopolitical factors, adding downward pressure on energy stocks. In premarket trading, Nasdaq 100 is up by 0.09%, S&P 500 by 0.02%, Dow down by 0.05%, and R2K rose by 0.49%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust edged up by 0.07% to $580.16 while Invesco QQQ ETF moved up by 0.10% to $491.36. Market retreated on Tuesday due to ASML Holdings N.V.’s weak revenue forecast and oil price plunges. S&P 500 and Nasdaq fell sharply post ASML’s earnings release following a regional manufacturing survey indicating unexpected contraction.

news.headline: Prime Drink Group raises $2.2M in funding, updates on Triani Acquisition.
news.summary: In Montreal on October 16, 2024, Prime Drink Group Corp. (CSE: PRME) disclosed it raised approximately $2,200,000. The Company expressed delight in the successful fundraising initiative.

news.headline: Plato Gold Corp appoints Andrew Leslie as Advisor, effective October 16, 2024. (Exact date and titles included)
news.summary: Plato Gold Corp. announced on Oct. 16, 2024, that the company is welcoming the Honourable Andrew Leslie as Advisor. Plato Gold Corp. operates under the tickers TSX-V: PGC, OTCQB: NIOVF, and Frankfurt: 4Y7 or WKN: A0M2QX.

news.headline: Organogenesis Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ORGO) will report Q3 2024 financial results on November 12, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Organogenesis Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ORGO), a prominent regenerative medicine firm concentrating on product solutions for Advanced Wound Care, Surgical, and Sports Medicine markets, shared plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024 on November 12th after the market closes.

news.headline: Base Carbon Inc. (Cboe CA: BCBN) announces project updates through its subsidiary, Base Carbon Capital Partners Corp.
news.summary: Toronto-based Base Carbon Inc. provided project updates on Oct. 16, 2024, through its subsidiary Base Carbon Capital Partners Corp. The company, trading as Cboe CA: BCBN and OTCQX: BCBNF, shared the information.

news.headline: $MS Morgan Stanley Q3 2024 Earnings
Survey by TELUS shows majority prioritize data privacy. Findings from 2024 Data & Trust survey released.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by TELUS, a prominent communications and technology firm, disclosed that a significant number of participants emphasized the heightened importance of data privacy. Released on October 16, 2024, the results from the 2024 Data & Trust survey highlighted a growing unease regarding this issue among respondents in Toronto. The data indicated that an overwhelming majority of individuals expressed that data privacy is currently more significant to them than it has ever been.

news.headline: Techem ranks in top 3% globally for ESG risk with rating of 9.6 by Morningstar Sustainalytics; 6th in "Business Support Services.
news.summary: Techem has been rated by Morningstar Sustainalytics, a prominent ESG data, research, and ratings provider. According to their assessment, Techem's ESG risk is at a very low 9.6, categorized as "negligible." This places Techem in the top 3% globally among more than 16,000 companies evaluated. Specifically, within the sub-industry of "Business Support Services," Techem holds the 6th position.

news.headline: Chevron, Houston Texans Legends, and Kids’ Meals collaborate to set record by packing 18,000 lunches for Houston kids. Chevron also donates $18,000 to Kids’ Meals.
news.summary: Chevron U.S.A. Inc. has launched its volunteer program, H-Town Blitz, in collaboration with Houston Texans Legends Community. This initiative began in early October with a strong focus on community welfare. On October 17, Chevron is working alongside Kids' Meals Houston to assemble a groundbreaking 18,000 brown bag lunches. These will then be delivered to the residences of underprivileged children in the Greater Houston Area. As part of their support, Chevron is making a substantial $18,000 donation to Kids’ Meals Houston during the event. The program involves Josetta Jones, Chief of Chevron, and aims to make a significant impact on local children in need.

news.headline: Velico partners with Versiti for Blood Center Education Program; Versiti to join Velico's BCEP.
news.summary: In Boston on October 16, 2024, Velico, a prominent developer of spray dried plasma manufacturing technology, revealed that Versiti, Inc., an innovative blood health solutions provider, will join their Blood Center Education Program (BCEP).

news.headline: HVN Enterprises LLC plans state-of-the-art cannabis company in Kewanee, IL, promoting responsible access, economic growth, and odor mitigation.
news.summary: In Kewanee, Illinois on October 16, 2024, HVN Enterprises LLC revealed exciting plans for Top Deck Cannabis Company. The proposed venture aims to be a cutting-edge, vertically integrated cannabis establishment, offering cultivation, infusion, manufacturing, and dispensing of recreational cannabis products.

news.headline: EIMA welcomes Georgia-Pacific Building Products as new associate member, a leading manufacturer in North America.
news.summary: In Falls Church, Virginia on October 16, 2024, the EIFS Industry Members Association (EIMA) shared that Georgia-Pacific Building Products has returned to the association as its latest associate member. Georgia-Pacific is a prominent manufacturer of building materials in North America. This move highlights EIMA's continued growth, with their membership now including Georgia-Pacific. This development signifies a strategic expansion for EIMA, reaffirming its position as a key industry organization.

news.headline: Funnel Leasing unveils AI-driven CRM enhanced with Generative AI, used by 8 of top 25 multifamily owners.
news.summary: A new product has been introduced by Funnel Leasing, the leading AI-infused multifamily CRM solution. Utilizing generative AI and large language models, this updated version offers more conversational responses. Trusted by 8 out of the top 25 multifamily owners and managers, Funnel Leasing's cutting-edge technology continues to revolutionize the industry. This announcement was made in Tampa, Florida, on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: German Chancellor Scholz on Israeli Arms Deliveries: There are deliveries and there will be in the future.
Modine introduces new infrared heating solutions for outdoor spaces, enhancing comfort in various venues. (Total characters: 108)
news.summary: Recently, Modine (NYSE: MOD) introduced new gas-fired units tailored for outdoor spaces like home patios, decks, restaurant patios, and entertainment venues. These innovative additions aim to boost comfort levels in such settings. The launch took place in Racine, Wis., on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: A. Stewart Roofing has provided roofing and waterproofing solutions in New York for over 45 years.
news.summary: For more than 45 years, A. Stewart Roofing & Waterproofing has been the go-to roofing and waterproofing company for New York residents. Established in 1973, the company has built a strong reputation for providing exceptional services. Specializing in roof repair and waterproofing solutions, A. Stewart Roofing & Waterproofing has become a trusted name in the industry. Serving homeowners throughout New York, the company is known for its top-quality service and expertise.

news.headline: Dispute AI™ by Credknowledgy Inc. transforms DIY credit repair through advanced AI technology, bringing financial tools to consumers.
news.summary: AI-Powered Credit Repair Software is aiding consumers in improving Credit Scores; CHEYENNE, WY, Oct. 16, 2024 - Credknowledgy Inc., a prominent AI-driven financial tools provider, is pleased to report the ongoing triumph of its cutting-edge Dispute AI™ software. This innovative tool is designed to assist users in improving their credit scores.

news.headline: Treewurk offers tree care and removal services in Georgia, serving Kennesaw, Marietta, Acworth.
news.summary: Treewurk, a leading provider of tree care services, is offering its expertise to residential and commercial clients in Georgia. Based in Marietta, the company serves customers in Kennesaw, Marietta, Acworth, and beyond. With a reputation for excellence, Treewurk is the go-to choice for homeowners, property managers, and contractors seeking professional tree care and removal solutions. The services provided cater to a wide range of needs, ensuring that clients receive top-tier assistance for their specific requirements. Contact Treewurk today for all your tree care needs in Georgia.

news.headline: Aurora Cannabis introduces new oil products in Australia with MedReleaf for diverse patient needs. NASDAQ: ACB, TSX: ACB.
news.summary: Aurora Cannabis Inc., a prominent medical cannabis company in Canada listed on NASDAQ and TSX under ACB, has recently collaborated with MedReleaf Australia to introduce new oil products aimed at expanding patient care options. This partnership signals the commitment of Aurora Cannabis Inc. to provide enhanced medical cannabis solutions. The announcement was made in Edmonton, AB on October 16, 2024. Aurora Cannabis Inc. is recognized as a global leader in medical cannabis, setting the standards for the industry with its innovative products. Such advancements in medical cannabis offerings are expected to positively impact patient treatment with increased efficacy and tailored options for various medical conditions.

news.headline: Megan Lundy appointed as Managing Director and Head of Investor Relations at Percheron Capital in San Francisco.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in San Francisco, Percheron Capital, a private equity firm specializing in essential services businesses, revealed the appointment of Megan Lundy as the Managing Director and Head of Investor Relations. Lundy will spearhead investor relations activities for the firm.

news.headline: CoinDesk acquires CCData and CryptoCompare for enhanced information services - bolstering its position in the crypto industry.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, CoinDesk, a prominent media, events, and data firm in the crypto industry, revealed its acquisition of CCData, a reputable benchmark administrator in the UK which is regulated by the FCA. CoinDesk is recognized worldwide for its contribution to the crypto economy, including indices and data services. This strategic move signifies a significant development in both companies' growth strategies and consolidation efforts. Through this acquisition, CoinDesk aims to expand its market presence and enhance its service offerings to meet the growing demand for reliable and accurate data in the crypto sector.
